behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both files, the function/endpoint names, payload keys (lora_name, lora_int_id), registry path (raw_request.app.state.openai_serving_models.lora_requests), and the version format {lora_name}-v{version}.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check payload contains lora_name substring and version suffix 'v{n}', and check func source references lora_requests and registry — which alternative correct implementations would satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Payload forwarding, version suffix, empty payload when use_lora=False, and registry update logic all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped with comment headers fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass, gates, repo CI.

structured_data_schema.reason: Payload keys lora_name and lora_int_id are documented in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.
